results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Group-theoretic decomposition of attention into orthogonal irreducible components aligned with permutation subgroup + Q/K/V projection into symmetric subspaces IS the group-averaging symmetric-projection repair mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Group equivariant self-attention for vision is the 4-fold rotational equivariance attention mechanism.
SE(3)-equivariant graph attention transformer covers rotation-equivariance attention paradigm.
Third-generation SE(3)-equivariant graph attention transformer covers rotation-equivariance + group-projection paradigm.
EXACT TWIN — Rotation-equivariant attention with vector neurons IS the rotation-equivariance attention head mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Rotationally symmetric pinwheel-shaped conv + sparse transformer for defect detection IS the rotational symmetry feature map defect detection mechanism.
Intrinsic rotational symmetry defect detection IS the rotational symmetry defect detection mechanism.
Symmetric Dual-dimensional Attention Module parallel symmetric modeling covers symmetric attention feature processing.
